mapper.sql: select c.certificate_id, c.supplier_id, c.hospital_id, c.certificate_type, c.certificate_name, c.certificate_no, c.issue_date, c.expire_date, c.certificate_file, c.audit_status, c.audit_by, c.audit_time, c.audit_remark, c.is_expired, c.is_warning, c.status, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark, s.company_name as supplier_name, s.supplier_code as supplier_code, s.contact_person as contact_person, s.address as address, h.hospital_code as hospital_code, h.hospital_name as hospital_name from scm_supplier_certificate c left join scm_supplier s on c.supplier_id = s.supplier_id and s.del_flag = '0' left join scm_hospital h on c.hospital_id = h.hospital_id and h.del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: insert into scm_supplier_certificate( supplier_id, hospital_id, certificate_type, certificate_name, certificate_no, issue_date, expire_date, certificate_file, audit_status, audit_by, audit_time, audit_remark, is_expired, is_warning, status, remark, create_by, create_time )values( #{supplierId}, #{hospitalId}, #{certificateType}, #{certificateName}, #{certificateNo}, #{issueDate}, #{expireDate}, #{certificateFile}, #{auditStatus}, #{auditBy}, #{auditTime}, #{auditRemark}, #{isExpired}, #{isWarning}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate() )
mapper.update: update scm_supplier_certificate set certificate_file = #{certificateFile, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where certificate_id = #{certificateId}

update scm_supplier_certificate set certificate_no = #{certificateNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, certificate_name = #{certificateName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, issue_date = #{issueDate, jdbcType=DATE}, expire_date = #{expireDate, jdbcType=DATE}, certificate_file = #{certificateFile, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remark = #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_expired = #{isExpired, jdbcType=CHAR}, is_warning = #{isWarning, jdbcType=CHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where certificate_id = #{certificateId}
update scm_supplier_certificate set status = '1' where certificate_id = #{certificateId}

update scm_supplier_certificate set status = '1' where certificate_id in
#{certificateId}
